# silentPDF AI

> Fast, private PDF tools that run in your browser. Merge, split, compress, convert, rotate, sign, watermark, and protect PDFs without uploads.

## Pages
- [Home](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/): All PDF tools, browser-based.
- [All Tools](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools)
- [Blog](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/blog): Guides on compressing, merging, converting, and protecting PDFs.
- [Privacy](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/privacy)

## Tools
- [Merge PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/merge-pdf)
- [Split PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/split-pdf)
- [Compress PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/compress-pdf)
- [PDF to Word](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/pdf-to-word)
- [Word to PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/word-to-pdf)
- [Rotate PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/rotate-pdf)
- [Remove Pages](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/remove-pages)
- [Protect PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/protect-pdf)
- [Edit PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/edit-pdf)
- [E-Sign PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/esign-pdf)
- [Watermark PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/watermark-pdf)
- [Photo to PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/photo-to-pdf)
- [Reorder PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/tools/reorder-pdf)

- [Compress PDF for email](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/compress-pdf-for-email)

- [Merge 2 PDFs](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/merge-2-pdfs)
- [Merge multiple PDFs](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/merge-multiple-pdfs)
- [PDF to Word online](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/pdf-to-word-online)
- [PDF to Word for resume](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/pdf-to-word-for-resume)
- [PDF to Word with formatting](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/pdf-to-word-with-formatting)
- [Sign PDF online](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/sign-pdf-online)
- [Sign contract PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/sign-contract-pdf)
- [Watermark PDF online](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/watermark-pdf-online)
- [Add logo watermark to PDF](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/add-logo-watermark-pdf)

- [How to compress a PDF under 1MB](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/blog/how-to-compress-pdf-under-1mb)

- [Merge-then-compress workflow](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/blog/merge-then-compress-workflow)
- [Convert PDF to Word without breaking formatting](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/blog/convert-pdf-to-word-without-breaking-formatting)
- [Password-protect a PDF the right way](https://silentpdfai.pages.dev/blog/password-protect-pdf-the-right-way)
